calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-14-2011 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Oct-27-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for Bertha Joung (Petitioner).

Ms. Ng stated that there was no objection. The Court granted the petition (order for the same signed in open Court). Bond in the amount of $763,000.00 is required. The Court also granted the ex parte request for waiving notice to Parties with unknown addresses (order for the same also signed in open Court).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Oct-20-2010 Continued To Oct-27-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Sep-29-2010 Continued To Oct-20-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
